hero.secondary: Simulation, infrastructure, and numerical methods. Building production systems at NAV IT.

primary.name: Deadreckon
capabilities: Proportional navigation under realistic sensor degradation.
Monte Carlo exploration across engagement geometries.
primary.scope: Rust workspace with simulation core, CLI, and visualization
primary.evidence: Evaluated across six engagement scenarios with configurable noise profiles

primary.name: Propagator
primary.purpose: Composable state propagation for physical systems.
capabilities: RK4 numerical integration with adaptive stepping.
Composable force pipeline — gravity, drag, thrust.
primary.scope: Rust library designed as simulation substrate

foundational.name: Foundry
capabilities: Webhook-driven builds with automatic PR verification.
Routes domains, manages secrets, deploys itself.
foundational.scope: Rust backend with PostgreSQL and React dashboard
foundational.evidence: Deploys itself and six services to a sovereign Mac Mini M4

foundational.name: N-Body
foundational.evidence: Numerical behavior observed over extended runs

foundational.name: Neural-Nets
foundational.evidence: Training behavior observed through loss convergence

foundational.name: Oxidize
foundational.purpose: Real-time voxel rendering as a performance study.
capabilities: Performance profiling under varying world sizes

infrastructure.summary: All services run on a single Mac Mini M4 — deployed through Foundry, exposed through Cloudflare Tunnels.

work.description: Production systems with strict requirements for correctness, accessibility, and long-term maintainability.
Data analysis, cloud infrastructure, and internal tooling across short-term placements.
Teaching programming to children through hands-on projects.
